The Lot of Fortune

Wisdom written in the stars

Your sun sign puts you in a box with a twelfth of everyone alive. The old astrologers didn't work that way. They read the whole sky you were born under and graded it, one planet at a time, to see how your life is actually built, how you earn, how you love, how your years move.

That's what this does. Put in your birth details and watch your chart get cast, your money and your marriage read, the year ahead laid out.

★Real Hellenistic doctrineBuilt on Vettius Valens, Demetra George, Chris Brennan, and Öner Döşer. Whole-sign houses and the seven classical planets, the way the tradition actually teaches it.
☀Honest, not flatteringYou get your chart straight, the easy roads and the hard ones both.
☽Yours aloneIt's all worked out on your own phone. Nothing you type gets stored or sent anywhere.

Cast your chart

Calculated privately on your device · nothing stored, nothing sent
